title: The Crew Accepts the Matchups
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is the crew accepts the matchups.
scene: The scene follows the crew accepts the matchups, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're not taking the Royal Family, Gyaban!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would appear... that jimbei had organised some kind of plan with the straw hat pirates....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you really here to destroy the whole island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why did you take over the Palace?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just tell us one thing!!! Are you enemies of fish-man Island?! or are you our Allies?!

summary: The Crew Accepts the Matchups. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
